name: Canvas Run Graph Gates
outcome_goal: Canvas run view renders root-heavy workflows as complete compact structures and exposes gates/data-entry contracts in the UI.
anti_requirements: Do not change runtime workflow execution semantics.
Do not move gate/path labels back into node headers.
Do not include Atlas changes in this spec.

jobs.label: discover_canvas_run_presenter
jobs.prompt: Inspect Canvas run presenter, run overlay, node detail, run snapshot types, and current dirty diffs. Identify which dirty changes are usable for root-heavy layout, edge gate labeling, and completion contract display.

jobs.label: repair_run_layout_and_gate_projection
jobs.prompt: Finalize run graph presentation. Keep compact component layout for root-heavy graphs; keep edge gate projection fields; keep completion contract pass-through. Ensure independent/root-heavy workflows do not render as a hidden vertical column.

jobs.label: repair_run_contract_surfaces
jobs.prompt: Finalize completion gate display in run overlay and node detail. Show task type, result kind, submit tool names, outcome, scope, and prompt details when present. Keep text responsive and non-overlapping.

jobs.label: test_canvas_run_graph_gates
jobs.prompt: Add and run tests proving root-heavy run layout, edge gate labels/config, and completion contract display. Include the 10-node/1-edge root-heavy case.
